description_long: This object is a stylized flower with six broad, white petals arranged symmetrically around a central green pistil and several yellow-tipped stamens. The petals are slightly curved and spaced evenly, creating a radial pattern that gives the flower a balanced, open appearance. The central pistil is elongated and conical, surrounded by six prominent stamens with yellow anthers. At the base, there are a few dark green, lanceolate leaves that provide contrast to the lighter petals. The flower is attached to a short, cylindrical green stem, which appears sturdy and supports the entire structure. The overall design is clean and simplified, with smooth surfaces and a matte finish, making it suitable for decorative or educational use in urban parks or landscaped areas.
description: A stylized white flower with six broad petals, a central green pistil, yellow-tipped stamens, and dark green lanceolate leaves at the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of six white petals, central pistil, and all stamens clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the curvature of the petals and the alignment of the stamens around the pistil.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view with petals and leaves visible, highlighting the radial symmetry and the base of the stem.
description_view_3: Another rotated view similar to view 1, showing the petals' spacing and the central floral structures from a different angle.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration with six evenly spaced, overlapping petals forming a symmetrical circle around the central reproductive structures.
